**Saturday, August 1, 2015**

This past week, Senator Paul continued to lead the fight in the U.S. Senate to defund Planned Parenthood and protect all human life. The key showdown in the Senate over Planned Parenthood funding is expected next week. You can help by calling your Senators at 202-224-3121 and asking that they "Stand with Rand." The response to Rand's bold stand from grassroots conservatives from across the country has been overwhelming, with our momentum in key primary and caucus states continuing to grow every day.

Senator Paul once again visited Iowa and New Hampshire, where he was met with large, enthusiastic crowds at every stop. This upcoming week will also feature the first Republican Presidential Debate in Cleveland, Ohio. You can get ready for the big night by [clicking here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454904:28259724958:m:1:879035888:C4317A125F392E1F309FD7D1248EA769:r) to purchase your "Debate Watch Party Kit."

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist
Rand Paul for President

## News of the Week
---
| | |
### The Rand Paul tax plan stands out in a heavy GOP field
When you look more closely at Paul's tax plan, there's an argument that can be made that he has the boldest tax plan of any GOP presidential candidate in the past quarter century. It eliminates all estate and gift taxes, (most) tax credits, deductions, and loopholes that favor big business. Americans who identify as poor or in the lower middle class will benefit greatly from this plan.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454905:28259724958:m:1:879035888:C4317A125F392E1F309FD7D1248EA769:r)
---
|
### Rep. Lummis: Rand Paul GOP's Best Hope For Beating Hillary Clinton
Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) is the Republican presidential candidate best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton. By championing both economic and personal liberty, he inspires a conservative coalition more diverse than the group that elected Ronald Reagan.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454906:28259724958:m:1:879035888:C4317A125F392E1F309FD7D1248EA769:r)
---
|
### 150 in New Hampshire Stand Strong with Rand Paul for President
Rand Paul for President announced the endorsements of 25 New Hampshire leaders and activists. These endorsers join N.H. State Senators Andy Sanborn and Kevin Avard along with 26 State Representatives and 97 other endorsers, totaling 150 endorsements by New Hampshire public officials, business leaders, and activists.

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Running scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Just yesterday Planned Parenthood launched a massive public relations attack campaign -- flooding the Washington Machine's TV and radio market with ads to silence and squash out their opposition before Monday's vote.

If you and I don't ramp up our efforts, I'm afraid Planned Parenthood's powerful lobbying machine will bury our chance to strip them of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

Fellow Conservative, I really need you to chip in an emergency contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign expand and double-down on our hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads.

**[So won't you please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454619:28262872667:m:1:879035888:9AF367DF58B406092F11F00DCEFAA558:r)**?

Planned Parenthood's desperate attack campaign is proof that they're running scared.

They know the majority of Americans are disgusted with their actions and are demanding Congress strip them of their annual half a BILLION dollars in taxpayer handouts.

That's why Planned Parenthood is aiming their firepower solely at the Washington Machine, while my campaign is targeting grassroots Americans from coast to coast with my TV, radio and Internet ads.

I need your help to bust through Planned Parenthood's smear campaign and whip up a grassroots firestorm of support for my bill.

And if pro-abortion Democrats in the United States Senate truly want to support this madness, I believe they'll pay a HUGE price at the polls.

So **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454619:28262872667:m:1:879035888:9AF367DF58B406092F11F00DCEFAA558:r)** so I can mobilize millions of Americans from all over the country through mass emails, TV, radio and Internet ads.

I know I've asked a lot of you over the past several days since this story broke.

But Fellow Conservative, the vote is expected to go down Monday afternoon.

So this fight will come to a head in less than 48 hours.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29454619:28262872667:m:1:879035888:9AF367DF58B406092F11F00DCEFAA558:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

body:
Fellow Conservative,

As I write you, there are less than 48 hours until the U.S. Senate votes on my bill to strip Planned Parenthood of every dime of taxpayer funding.

I believe its passage or failure will hinge on just a handful of votes, so I must be able to count on your IMMEDIATE action.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29469462:28265025896:m:1:879035888:BF3EF45151D804E29B8028681F28EB6A:r)**?

There's no time to waste.

Planned Parenthood has just launched a massive PR blitz in Washington, D.C.

Their attorneys are busy trying to stop TV news networks from showing the American people video proof that the nation's largest abortion provider is aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling off their parts for profit.

And just yesterday, a federal judge issued a restraining order to prevent the release of any more videos until well after the U.S. Senate votes on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

This supposedly "objective" federal judge raised over $200,000 for President Obama and contributed almost $31,000 to committees supporting him!

The Washington machine stinks to high heaven.

I don't believe I've ever seen a more clear-cut case of just how corrupt and disgusting the abortion lobby and their defenders in Congress truly are.

Do they have no conscience?

That's all I can think about when I see videos of abortionists discussing how they alter the way they execute unborn babies to salvage their organs for sale.

Or joking "I want a Lamborghini" while haggling over the price of aborted baby parts.

Or announcing "it's another boy" as a medical assistant picks through a baby's hacked up legs.

These are the same people who say that anyone who wants to stop this madness is an "extremist" as they demand even more of our tax dollars!

This is straight out of the abortion lobby's age old playbook.

They couch their actions in flowery sounding euphemisms and smear anyone who dares to point out the sheer evil of what they're doing.

But the truth is, regardless of how the vote goes Monday, Planned Parenthood has lost.

The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

These are not globs of cells or "tissue."

These are human beings with hearts, lungs, livers and legs who are being killed and sold for spare parts.

Hillary Clinton and the rest of Planned Parenthood's allies in Congress are going to pay a severe price for defending this madness.

It's nothing less than pure evil.

But time is running out.

So please help me generate as much heat as I possibly can on Congress right away.

**[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29469462:28265025896:m:1:879035888:BF3EF45151D804E29B8028681F28EB6A:r)**!

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

I don't believe I've ever seen a more clear-cut case of just how corrupt and disgusting the abortion lobby and their defenders in Congress truly are. Do they have no conscience? That's all I can think about when I see videos of abortionists discussing how they alter the way they execute unborn babies to salvage their organs for sale. Or joking "I want a Lamborghini" while haggling over the price of aborted baby parts. Or announcing "it's another boy" as a medical assistant picks through a baby's hacked up legs. These are the same people who say that anyone who wants to stop this madness is an "extremist" as they demand even more of our tax dollars! This is straight out of the abortion lobby's age old playbook. They couch their actions in flowery sounding euphemisms and smear anyone who dares to point out the sheer evil of what they're doing. But the truth is, regardless of how the vote goes Monday, Planned Parenthood has lost. The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls. These are not globs of cells or "tissue." These are human beings with hearts, lungs, livers and legs who are being killed and sold for spare parts. Hillary Clinton and the rest of Planned Parenthood's allies in Congress are going to pay a severe price for defending this madness. It's nothing less than pure evil. But time is running out. So please help me generate as much heat as I possibly can on Congress right away. ! Thank you in advance for your generous support. | ** "" Contributed to DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb?
